_note: IFEval dose-response: 4 lessons (general + counting + format + include/exclude). One-shot priming. Cumulative over set 2. Tests whether MORE lessons keep helping or start hurting (the project's recurring 'more lessons hurt' law) on a benchmark with real headroom.
lessons: Identify every explicit requirement in the request and make sure your response satisfies all of them exactly.
When the request specifies an exact number — of words, sentences, paragraphs, bullet points, or highlighted sections — produce exactly that number.

Follow formatting literally: highlight with markdown asterisks (*text*), start bullet points with '*', wrap any required title in double angle brackets (<<title>>), output strictly valid JSON when asked, and use the exact letter case requested (e.g., all lowercase).
Honor inclusion and exclusion rules exactly: never use forbidden words or characters (for example, commas when banned), and always include any required words or closing phrase verbatim.
